images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model embodying a professional yoga instructor, radiating a cool and independent vibe on a skyscraper observation deck. She is wearing a stylishly unbuttoned beige trench coat over a sleek, form-fitting sports bra and high-waisted leggings that accentuate her fit, curvy silhouette and slim waist. Bathed in bright, clear Cyberpunk neon purple and blue lighting, her flawless skin texture glows with visible pores and faint vellus hair. Captured in mid-laugh, her head is thrown back slightly in a natural, candid moment of joy, her silky straight black hair catching the vibrant neon glow. The background features a blurred, high-end city nightscape with bokeh effects to emphasize her presence. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
